response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 'Sepia' via on-screen text at 00:00. 2. Identified song 'Bansanka' via on-screen lyrics 'ひゅるりらっぱっぱ' and confirmed artist 'tuki.' from text at 01:55. 3. Used search queries: '"Sepia" Mori Calliope Japanese and English lyrics' and '"Bansanka" tuki. Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Extracted relevant metadata and snippets for the JSON output.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina'nis. The video begins with the song 'Sepia' (performed by both) followed by a transition, and then concludes with the song 'Bansanka' (performed by Ninomae Ina'nis).

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'Sepia' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: (Yah) 呪われた役割に祝福を\n(Yah) そして、この血を流す利己的な魂を養え\n(Yah) 気づけば、すべてをコントロールできなくなった瞬間だ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Yah) Cast a blessing on my cursed role\n(Yah) And feed this bleeding egotistical soul\n(Yah) Before you know it, it's the moment you've lost all control

scenes.description: Musical transition with an animated heart crystal on stage.
Ninomae Ina'nis performs 'Bansanka' on stage surrounded by virtual spider lilies.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 君を泣かすから だから一緒にはいられないな\n君を泣かすから 早く忘れてほしいんだ\n人間だからね たまには違うものも食べたいね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Because I make you cry, that's why we can't be together\nBecause I make you cry, I want you to forget me quickly\nBecause I am human, sometimes I want to eat something different
